title: Redmond Police Department Flock Records Request

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting access to public records concerning the use of the Flock Safety Automated License Plate Reader (ALPR) system by the Redmond Police Department.

    I request the following records from January 1, 2024 to March 22, 2026:

    1. ALPR Search Audit Log: Please provide a copy of the complete search audit log, or equivalent electronic record, for all searches conducted by Redmond Police Department personnel in the Flock Safety system.

    If possible, please provide this log in a machine-readable format such as a CSV or Excel file. I request that this log include, but not be limited to, the following data fields for each individual search conducted:

        Date and time of the search
        The name, badge number, or unique identifier of the officer who conducted the search
        The justification or reason for the search (e.g., case number, specific crime type, “stolen vehicle,” etc.)
        The search parameters used (e.g., full or partial plate number, vehicle make/model, etc.)
        Whether the search produced any “hits” or results (a simple yes/no or a count of hits is sufficient).

    Clarification: To be clear, I am not requesting the photographic or location data returned by these searches. I am only requesting the administrative metadata about each search performed by city personnel.

    2. Policies and Procedures: Please provide a copy of all current policies, procedures, training manuals, and inter-agency agreements governing the use of the Flock Safety ALPR system by the Redmond Police Department.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joey JJ Jr S.

title: Redmond Police Department - Flock Master Service Agreement Request

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Provide a copy of the original Master Service Agreement (MSA) contract that was signed with Flock Safety to provide the City of Redmond ALRPs. Also provide any amendments made since the initial signing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joey JJ Jr S.

title: City of Redmond and the Washington Auto Theft Prevention Authority grant award for Flock ALRPs

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Provide a copy of the signed award agreement between the City of Redmond and the Washington Auto Theft Prevention Authority that helped fund Flock ALRPs for the city. The city council has mentioned this several times while discussing the removal of Flock ALRPs from the city.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joey JJ Jr S.

title: Emails and Map records relating to Flock ALRPs in Redmond

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. A map, or equivalent document, that shows the current, planned, or installed locations of all Flock Safety automated license plate reader (ALPR) cameras within the city limits of Redmond. Specifically, I would like clarification on the status of the camera that was planned for NE 51st St @ 520 (WB). If a single map document does not exist, I request a list of the street addresses, cross-streets, or GPS coordinates for each camera. 

2. All email communications, including any attachments, sent to or received by any Redmond Police Department staff member with any email address ending in “@flocksafety.com” or any other known flock email domains. The requested date range for this correspondence is from January 1st 2024 to the date this request is processed. Ideally, this data is presented in a PST or other machine-readable format.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Joey JJ Jr S.
